description: Draws a shaded band showing one standard deviation around the mean on a PMF or binomial chart. Computes Var(X) = E(X^2) - [E(X)]^2 and displays sigma and variance values.
utility: Show variance/standard deviation band on a chart

arguments.name: chart
arguments.description: Reference to a PMF or binomial chart

arguments.name: fillColor
arguments.description: Color for the sigma-band and label (default: steelblue)

examples.expression:
S = sspace(dice(2), at(4,10), view(12,12))
P = pmf(S, sum, at(4,24), view(10,10))
variance(P, fc(steelblue))

B = binomial(20, 0.3, at(4,10), view(10,10))
variance(B, fc(lightblue))
